title: 7 Herbal Tinctures For Difficult Speaking
description: Ginkgo biloba tinctures contains flavonoids and terpenoids, which are compounds that help improve blood flow to the brain and reduce inflammation. This can be beneficial for people with difficulty speaking due to conditions like aphasia, stuttering, or stroke-induced speech problems. The flavonoids, particularly quercetin and kaempferol, have antioxidant properties that protect brain cells from damage.
